violations.text: The coving in the kitchenette was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026

Stagnant water was observed in the food processor. PIC informed. Equipment was washed, rinsed, sanitized and air dried during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the kitchenette icemachine dispenser was observed with an accumulation of black residue. Dispenser was cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024
